svg.title: Chat history flow diagram
svg.desc: Shows how twilio_delivery, twilio_template_message, and twilio_responses tables combine in fetchHistory, with the drop condition for undelivered messages

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Twilio send in the delivery webhook?')
sendPrompt('What does the INNER JOIN between twilio_delivery and twilio_template_message do?')
sendPrompt('Why are messages without a delivery record dropped?')
sendPrompt('How are sent and received messages sorted together?')
sendPrompt('What does the final combined array look like?')
